name: Generate AI trading alerts from CoinGecko and Alpha Vantage via Slack, email and SMS

parameters.content:
## AI Trading Alert Bot

Automates market data fetching, technical analysis, and AI-powered buy/sell signal generation. Monitors multiple cryptocurrencies and stocks in real-time, analyzes price trends, and delivers actionable trading alerts.

## How it works

1. **Trigger** — Runs every 15 minutes or on manual trigger
2. **Fetch Market Data** — Retrieves real-time price data from multiple sources
3. **Technical Analysis** — Calculates indicators (RSI, MACD, Moving Averages)
4. **AI Signal Generation** — Uses machine learning to predict buy/sell signals
5. **Alert Processing** — Validates signals and filters false positives
6. **Notifications** — Sends alerts via Email, Slack, and SMS
7. **Database Storage** — Logs all signals and trade history

## Setup steps

1. **API Keys** — Configure CoinGecko, Alpha Vantage, or your preferred market data provider
2. **Database** — Set up PostgreSQL table for trade history and signals
3. **Notifications** — Configure Slack webhook, email SMTP, and SMS provider credentials
4. **AI Model** — Replace AI endpoint with your trained model API
5. **Trading Symbols** — Update symbol list (BTC, ETH, AAPL, GOOGL, etc.)
6. **Test** — Run manually to verify all connections and validate signals

## 1. Trigger

Automatically runs every 15 minutes to fetch fresh market data and generate trading signals

## 2. Fetch & Prepare Data

Collects real-time market data from APIs and prepares it for technical analysis in parallel

## 3. Analysis & Signal Generation

Calculates technical indicators and uses AI/ML model to generate buy/sell signals with confidence scores

## 4. Validate, Alert & Store

Filters signals, sends notifications across multiple channels, logs trades, and stores in database
